debug_info.goal:
case hf.refine_2.right
r : ℝ
f : ℂ → ℂ
hr : r ≠ 0
h : Meromorphic f
h₂ : 0 < meromorphicOrderAt f 0
this✝¹ : Ioc (2 * Real.pi) 0 = ∅
this✝ : Meromorphic f
this : Measurable f
⊢ MeasureTheory.Integrable
    (fun x => ∫ (y : ℝ) in Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi), |log ‖circleMap 0 1 y - f (circleMap 0 r x)‖| ∂MeasureTheory.volume)
    (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi)))

failed_attempts:
<;>
        (try
          {
            -- Attempt to use the fact that the integrand is zero to prove integrability
            have h₃ : (fun x : ℝ => 0 : ℝ → ℝ) = (fun x : ℝ => 0 : ℝ → ℝ) := rfl
            simp_all [MeasureTheory.integrable_zero]

        <;>

            -- Use the fact that the integrand is zero to prove integrability
            apply MeasureTheory.integrable_zero
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            -- If none of the above work, try to use the integrating factor approach
            have h₃ : (fun x : ℝ => 0 : ℝ → ℝ) = (fun x : ℝ => 0 : ℝ → ℝ) := rfl
            simp_all [MeasureTheory.integrable_zero]
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            -- Use the fact that the integrand is zero to prove integrability
            apply MeasureTheory.integrable_zero

<;>
